description: colorize without --zsh produces correct ANSI sequences
colorize with --zsh produces zsh prompt codes
colorize without bg produces no background code
steps: Check output contains no %K{ and no \e[48;

description: two consecutive direct colorize calls concatenate without newlines
steps: In a zsh function, call colorize twice without $() capture
Check there is no \n between the two colored segments
